text.title: lang-jvm-jreleaser-tag-release Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lang-jvm-jreleaser-tag-release as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Triggering JReleaser on push to main instead of on a tag, then editing jreleaser.yml to skip steps when no version bump is detected.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Conflates branch CI with release CI; permission scopes (signing keys, package-manager tokens) leak into every PR and the release log loses its provenance line.

failure-mode.description: Storing the GPG passphrase in jreleaser.yml so the agent can run releases locally for testing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Secrets in source control leak forever; use JRELEASER_GPG_PASSPHRASE env var, repository secret, or OIDC, and run dry-runs against target/staging-deploy instead.
